title: Upon Linnet. Epig.
content:
Linnet plays rarely on the lute, we know;
    And sweetly sings, but yet his breath says no.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Linnet. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
